staticText: Rent vs Buy Scenario Comparison. Route the user to the private local worksheet and explain only its equal-horizon arithmetic. The user supplies one horizon from 1 to 600 months and every rent-side and buy-side amount: upfront cash, monthly housing cash, other monthly cash, other one-off cash, and final cash received at the horizon. For each side, gross cash out equals upfront cash plus monthly cash across the horizon plus other one-off cash; net cash cost equals gross cash out minus the user-entered final cash received. The result may state which entered net cash cost is lower for that submitted scenario only. Never turn that line into a recommendation. Never supply or infer appreciation, rent growth, interest rate, tax rate, investment return, opportunity cost, country preset, deposit refund, sale price, remaining mortgage balance, break-even year or lifestyle verdict. Mortgage repayments belong to the separate mortgage planner; investment ROI and rental yield belong to their specialist tools. No entered financial field is sent to AI or persisted. Local JSON and PDF exports preserve the method boundary.
